# Transcrição: 24-Warm-Hot Custom Audiences

- **Duração:** 00:51

## [00:00 - 00:51]

In this video, I'm going to show you how to create warm and hot custom audiences. So in order to get to this page, you need to just go to the Business Manager or the Ads Manager and you need to click on this hamburger drop-down menu and then you just go to All Tools and then Audiences and that will redirect you to this page. So in order to actually create these audiences, so remember, a custom audience is anyone who's engaged with or interacted with you, your brand, or your content before. So there's two different segments that you can break down and I'll show you. So you just need to go to Create Audience here, you go to Custom Audience and then you'll be prompted to create either an audience using your sources or an audience using Facebook sources. So those are the two different segments that you can create custom audiences in. And in the next videos, we're going to show you how to create those audiences.
